name: Instagram Add Link
description: Opens Instagram, navigates to Edit Profile, and adds an external link with a title.

params.title: The display title for the link

steps.goal: Open Instagram. Tap the profile tab (bottom-right icon). Then tap 'Edit profile' button. Wait for the Edit Profile screen to load.
You are on the Edit Profile screen. Find and tap 'Add link' (or 'Links' if a link section is visible). Then tap 'Add external link'. You should see fields for URL and Title.

You should see the 'Add external link' form with URL and Title fields. Tap the URL field and type: '{{url}}'. Then tap the Title field and type: '{{title}}'. Verify both fields are filled correctly. Then tap the checkmark or 'Done' button (top-right) to save the link. Wait for confirmation, then mark done.
